final:
module RefModule
(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [7:0] q
);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};


    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 8'b00000000; // Clear counter to 00000000
        end else if (enable) begin
            q <= q + 1; // Increment counter
        end
    end

endmodule
